clinical_tables.name: cytogenetic_chromosome_locations
clinical_tables.description: This API provides access to information about cytogenetic locations, taken from the NCBI ideogram data.

terms.description: The search string (e.g., just a part of a word) for which to find matches in the list. More than one partial word can be present in "terms", in which case there is an implicit AND between them.

maxList.description: Optional, with a default of 7. Specifies the number of results requested, up to the upper limit of 500. If present but the value is empty, 500 will be used. Note that this parameter does not support pagination, see "count" and "offset" below for details on pagination support.

count.description: The number of results to retrieve (page size). The maximum count allowed is 500, see "offset" below on pagination support.

offset.description: The starting result number (0-based) to retrieve. Use offset and count together for pagination. Note that the current limit on the total number of results that can be retrieved (offset + count) is 7,500.

q.description: An optional, additional query string used to further constrain the results returned by the "terms" field. Unlike the terms field, "q" is not automatically wildcarded, but can include wildcards and can specify field names.

df.description: A comma-separated list of display fields which are intended for the user to see when looking at the results. Default: cytogenetic

sf.description: A comma-separated list of fields to be searched. Default: All fields

cf.description: A field to regard as the "code" for the returned item data. Default: cytogenetic

ef.description: A comma-separated list of additional fields to be returned for each retrieved list item. If you wish the keys in the returned data hash to be something other than the field names, you can specify an alias for the field name by separating it from its field name with a colon.

total.description: The total number of results on the server, which can be more than the number of results returned.

codes.description: An array of codes for the returned items.

display.description: An array, with one element for each returned code, where each element is an array of the display strings.

extras.description: A hash of the "extra" data requested via the "ef" query parameter.

code_systems.description: An array, with one element for each returned code, where each element is the "code system" for the returned code.

clinical_tables.name: icd10cm_diagnosis_codes
clinical_tables.description: ICD-10-CM (International Classification of Diseases, 10th Revision, Clinical Modification) is a medical coding system for classifying diagnoses and reasons for visits in U.S. health care settings.

terms.description: The search string (e.g., just a part of a word) for which to find matches in the list. More than one partial word can be present in "terms", in which case there is an implicit AND between them.

maxList.description: Optional, with a default of 7. Specifies the number of results requested, up to the upper limit of 500. If present but the value is empty, 500 will be used. Note that this parameter does not support pagination, see "count" and "offset" below for details on pagination support.

count.description: The number of results to retrieve (page size). The maximum count allowed is 500, see "offset" below on pagination support.

offset.description: The starting result number (0-based) to retrieve. Use offset and count together for pagination. Note that the current limit on the total number of results that can be retrieved (offset + count) is 7,500.

q.description: An optional, additional query string used to further constrain the results returned by the "terms" field. Unlike the terms field, "q" is not automatically wildcarded, but can include wildcards and can specify field names.

df.description: A comma-separated list of display fields which are intended for the user to see when looking at the results. Default: code, name

sf.description: A comma-separated list of fields to be searched. Default: code

cf.description: A field to regard as the "code" for the returned item data. Default: code

ef.description: A comma-separated list of additional fields to be returned for each retrieved list item. If you wish the keys in the returned data hash to be something other than the field names, you can specify an alias for the field name by separating it from its field name with a colon.

total.description: The total number of results on the server, which can be more than the number of results returned.

codes.description: An array of codes for the returned items.

display.description: An array, with one element for each returned code, where each element is an array of the display strings.

extras.description: A hash of the "extra" data requested via the "ef" query parameter.

code_systems.description: An array, with one element for each returned code, where each element is the "code system" for the returned code.

clinical_tables.name: rxterms_prescription_drugs
clinical_tables.description: Rxterms is a drug interface terminology derived from Rxnorm (the U.S. terminology standard for clinical drugs) which can be easily used for prescription writing or medication history recording (e.g., in e-prescribing systems or PHRs).

terms.description: The search string (e.g., just a part of a word) for which to find matches in the list. More than one partial word can be present in "terms", in which case there is an implicit AND between them.

maxList.description: Optional, with a default of 7. Specifies the number of results requested, up to the upper limit of 500. If present but the value is empty, 500 will be used. Note that this parameter does not support pagination, see "count" and "offset" below for details on pagination support.

count.description: The number of results to retrieve (page size). The maximum count allowed is 500, see "offset" below on pagination support.

offset.description: The starting result number (0-based) to retrieve. Use offset and count together for pagination. Note that the current limit on the total number of results that can be retrieved (offset + count) is 7,500.

q.description: An optional, additional query string used to further constrain the results returned by the "terms" field. Unlike the terms field, "q" is not automatically wildcarded, but can include wildcards and can specify field names.

df.description: A comma-separated list of display fields which are intended for the user to see when looking at the results. Default: DISPLAY_NAME

sf.description: A comma-separated list of fields to be searched. Default: DISPLAY_NAME, DISPLAY_NAME_SYNONYM

cf.description: A field to regard as the "code" for the returned item data. Default: DISPLAY_NAME

ef.description: A comma-separated list of additional fields to be returned for each retrieved list item. If you wish the keys in the returned data hash to be something other than the field names, you can specify an alias for the field name by separating it from its field name with a colon.

total.description: The total number of results on the server, which can be more than the number of results returned.

codes.description: An array of codes for the returned items.

display.description: An array, with one element for each returned code, where each element is an array of the display strings.

extras.description: A hash of the "extra" data requested via the "ef" query parameter.

code_systems.description: An array, with one element for each returned code, where each element is the "code system" for the returned code.

clinical_tables.name: icd9cm_diagnosis_codes
clinical_tables.description: ICD-9-CM (International Classification of Diseases, Ninth Revision, Clinical Modification) is a medical coding system for classifying diagnoses and reasons for visits in U.S. health care settings.

terms.description: The search string (e.g., just a part of a word) for which to find matches in the list. More than one partial word can be present in "terms", in which case there is an implicit AND between them.

maxList.description: Optional, with a default of 7. Specifies the number of results requested, up to the upper limit of 500. If present but the value is empty, 500 will be used. Note that this parameter does not support pagination, see "count" and "offset" below for details on pagination support.

sf.description: A comma-separated list of fields to be searched.

cf.description: A field to regard as the "code" for the returned item data.

codes.description: An array of codes for the returned items.

display.description: An array, with one element for each returned code, where each element is an array of the display strings.

clinical_tables.name: genetic_diseases
clinical_tables.description: The genetic diseases dataset was created by the National Center for Biomedical Information at the U.S. National Library of Medicine for the ClinVar public database. ClinVar is a freely accessible, public archive of reports of the relationships among human genetic variations and phenotypes, with supporting evidence.

terms.description: The search string (e.g., just a part of a word) for which to find matches in the list. More than one partial word can be present in "terms", in which case there is an implicit AND between them.

maxList.description: Optional, with a default of 7. Specifies the number of results requested, up to the upper limit of 500. If present but the value is empty, 500 will be used.

count.description: The number of results to retrieve (page size). The maximum count allowed is 500.

offset.description: The starting result number (0-based) to retrieve. Use offset and count together for pagination.

q.description: An optional, additional query string used to further constrain the results returned by the "terms" field.

df.description: A comma-separated list of display fields which are intended for the user to see when looking at the results.

sf.description: A comma-separated list of fields to be searched.

cf.description: A field to regard as the "code" for the returned item data.

ef.description: A comma-separated list of additional fields to be returned for each retrieved list item.

clinical_tables.name: hcpcs_procedure_codes
clinical_tables.description: The Level II HCPCS codes are established by CMS's Alpha-Numeric Editorial Panel, primarily represent items and supplies and non-physician services not covered by the American Medical Association's Current Procedural Terminology-4 (CPT-4) codes; Medicare, Medicaid, and private health insurers use HCPCS procedure and modifier codes for claims processing.

terms.description: The search string for which to find matches in the list.

maxList.description: Number of results requested, up to 500.

q.description: Additional query string to constrain results.

cf.description: Field to regard as the code.

clinical_tables.name: hugo_genes
clinical_tables.description: The HUGO Gene Nomenclature Committee (HGNC) is the worldwide authority that assigns standardized nomenclature to human genes. The work of the HGNC is supported by National Human Genome Research Institute (NHGRI) and Wellcome Trust grants.

terms.description: Gene symbol or name to search for.

clinical_tables.name: pharmvar_star_alleles
clinical_tables.description: PharmVar is a pharmacogenomics variation database maintained by the Clinical Pharmacogenetics Implementation Consortium (CPIC), providing genetic variation information for drug-metabolizing enzymes, transporters, and drug targets.

terms.description: Gene name or star allele to search for.

clinical_tables.name: reference_sequences
clinical_tables.description: This API provides access to NCBI RefSeq database, a comprehensive, non-redundant, annotated collection of reference sequences including genomic, transcript, and protein sequences maintained by NCBI.

terms.description: Sequence ID or description to search for.

clinical_tables.name: dbvar_germline_data
clinical_tables.description: dbVar is NCBI's database of genomic structural variation that collects and displays information about human genomic structural variations including structural variants and copy number variants.

terms.description: Variant ID or description to search for.

rxnav.name: rxnorm_find_rxcui_by_string
rxnav.description: Searches for a drug by name (from any vocabulary in Rxnorm).

srclist.description: Filter: find only concepts that include an atom from among these sources (if allsrc=1). Space-separated list.

search.description: Precision: 0=Exact match only, 1=Normalized match, 2=Exact or Normalized, 9=Approximate match

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_drugs
rxnav.description: Get the drug products associated with a specified name. The name can be an ingredient, brand name, clinical dose form, branded dose form, clinical drug component, or branded drug component.

name.description: Name of ingredient, brand, clinical dose form, branded dose form, clinical drug component, or branded drug component

expand.description: Additional result fields to retrieve: psn=Prescribable Name (PSN)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

drug_groups.description: Groups of drug products organized by term type

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_related_by_type
rxnav.description: Get Rxnorm concepts, of term types specified by the tty parameter, related directly or indirectly to Rxnorm concept rxcui.

expand.description: Additional result fields to retrieve: psn=Prescribable Name (PSN)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

related_groups.description: Groups of related concepts organized by term type

rxnav.name: rxnorm_find_rxcui_by_id
rxnav.description: Searches for an identifier from an Rxnorm vocabulary or attribute indicated by idtype. Returns the RxCUIs of concepts associated with that identifier.

idtype.description: Type of identifier (e.g., NDC, ATC, UNII_CODE, etc.)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxcuis.description: Array of RxCUI identifiers associated with the input identifier

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_approximate_match
rxnav.description: Searches for strings in the data set that most closely match the term parameter. Useful for strings where exact or normalized string matching does not find desired results.

term.description: String, of which to find approximate matches

maxEntries.description: Coarse control of number of results

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rank.description: 1 for best matches, 2 for second-best, etc.

candidates.description: Array of candidate matches ordered by quality

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_all_concepts_by_tty
rxnav.description: Returns concepts of the term types specified by the tty parameter. Active concepts in the current Rxnorm data set.

tty.description: Term type(s), or ALL. Space-separated list.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

concepts.description: Array of Rxnorm concepts with specified term types

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_rxnorm_version
rxnav.description: Get the version of the Rxnorm data set and the version of the REST APIs.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

version.description: Version of Rxnorm that the API dispenses

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_term_types
rxnav.description: Get concept term types in the Rxnorm data set. Synonym term types such as TMSY, PSN or SY are not included.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

term_types.description: Array of term types available in Rxnorm

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_id_types
rxnav.description: Get concept identifier types that may be used with findRxcuiById.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_source_types
rxnav.description: Get source abbreviation (SAB) types used in Rxnorm data.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_rxnorm_name
rxnav.description: Get the Rxnorm name of an Rxnorm concept.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_spelling_suggestions
rxnav.description: Get spelling suggestions for a drug name string.

name.description: Drug name string to get spelling suggestions for

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_all_concepts_by_tty
rxnav.description: Concepts having a specified term type

tty.description: Term type(s), or ALL (Space-separated list. See getTermTypes for the menu.)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

concepts.description: Array of Rxnorm concepts with specified term types

rxnav.name: rxterms_get_all_concepts
rxnav.description: Get all concepts from the Rxterms dataset. Rxterms is a standardized drug name dataset for electronic prescription and pharmacy systems.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_all_classes
rxnav.description: Get all drug classes from the Rxclass dataset. Supports multiple classification systems like ATC, MeSH, SNOMED, etc.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: rxnorm_filter_by_property
rxnav.description: Filter Rxnorm concepts by property names and values. Useful for finding concepts with specific attributes like dose, ingredient, etc.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_display_terms
rxnav.description: Get display terms for an Rxnorm concept. Display terms provide various name forms of a concept for different display and search scenarios.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

display_terms.description: Array of display terms for the concept

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_all_properties
rxnav.description: Return certain categories of properties for the Rxnorm concept specified by rxcui. Information returned includes property name, value and category. The prop parameter selects the categories of properties to retrieve.

prop.description: Property categories to retrieve, or ALL (Space-separated list. See getPropCategories for the menu.)

propCategory.description: RxNav category that includes the property

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_rx_concept_properties
rxnav.description: Get the properties of the Rxnorm concept identified by rxcui. Information returned includes concept name, TTY, and a synonym.

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_rx_property
rxnav.description: Get the value(s) of property propName of the Rxnorm concept identified by rxcui. Results include a category for each property.

propName.description: Property name (See getPropNames for the menu.)

propCategory.description: RxNav category that includes the property

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_multi_ingred_brand
rxnav.description: Get the brands that contain all the ingredients specified (as RXCUIs) by the ingredientids parameter.

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_prop_categories
rxnav.description: Return the property categories available in RxNav.

propCategory.description: List of property categories (ATTRIBUTES, CODES, NAMES, SOURCES)

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_prop_names
rxnav.description: Return the property names available in RxNav. The response includes detailed information about each property, its category, the Rxnorm file it comes from, and other details.

propName.description: List of all available property names (e.g., ACTIVATED, ATC, DRUGBANK, RxCUI, etc.)

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_ndcs
rxnav.description: Get the active National Drug Codes (NDCs) for the Rxnorm concept specified by rxcui. Active NDCs are those NDCs present in the current version of Rxnorm. Only the NDCs curated by Rxnorm are returned. The NDCs are returned in the CMS 11-digit NDC derivative form.

rxcui.description: Rxnorm identifier of a drug product (term type SBD, SCD, BPCK, or GPCK)

items.description: National Drug Code (NDC) in CMS 11-digit format

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_all_related_info
rxnav.description: Get Rxnorm concepts related by RxNav's default paths to the concept identified by rxcui. The results include the concept identified by rxcui as well as related concepts. Concepts linked by reformulation relationships are not included.

expand.description: Additional result fields to retrieve (Space-separated list: genCard, psn)

tty.description: Term type of the concepts in this group

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_related_by_relationship
rxnav.description: Get Rxnorm concepts related to concept rxcui by relationships specified by the rela parameter.

rela.description: Relationship(s) (Space-separated list. See getRelaTypes for the menu.)

expand.description: Additional result fields to retrieve. One or more of: psn (Prescribable Name). Space-separated list.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

tty.description: Term type of the concepts in this group

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_rela_types
rxnav.description: Get the relationship names in the Rxnorm data set.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_rela_paths
rxnav.description: Get relationship paths leading from one term-type to another in Rxnorm's related-concepts graph.

start.description: Starting TTY (See getTermTypes for the menu.)

finish.description: Ending TTY (See getTermTypes for the menu.)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

path.description: Array of TTY values representing the relationship path

relationPaths.description: Array of relationship paths from one TTY to another

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_ndc_properties
rxnav.description: Get National Drug Code (NDC) properties for an NDC, or for NDCs with a given prefix, or for NDCs related to a concept by Rxnorm.

id.description: NDC (CMS 11-digit, or 5-3 or 4-4-2), or RXCUI, or FDA SPL set ID

ndcstatus.description: Status filter for NDCs to retrieve: active, obsolete, alien, ALL (Space-separated list)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

ndcItem.description: National Drug Code (NDC) in CMS 11-digit format

source.description: Source of properties (FDA, MTHSPL, Hybrid, RXNORM)

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_ndc_status
rxnav.description: Get the status and history of a National Drug Code (NDC) or of an alternate packaging if not found.

start.description: Start of date interval, as YYYYMM (e.g., 201408)

end.description: End of date interval, as YYYYMM (e.g., 201408)

history.description: Number of history entries to retrieve: 0=All, 1=Latest only

altpkg.description: Whether to retrieve information for an alternative packaging if the specified NDC is not found: 0=No, 1=Yes

data.description: Raw response data from the API

ndc11.description: National Drug Code (NDC) in CMS 11-digit format

active.description: Whether the NDC is currently considered active (YES/NO)

rxnormNdc.description: Whether the NDC is part of the Rxnorm NDC set (YES/NO)

sourceNames.description: Source vocabularies where the NDC is found

altNdc.description: 'Y' when the ndc11 field contains an NDC other than the one specified by the user

ndcActive.description: Whether the source considers this NDC as currently marketed (YES/NO)

ndcRxcui.description: Concept the source associated with the NDC

ndcSourceMappings.description: Concepts with which the NDC was most recently associated

activeRxcui.description: Current active RxCUI (may be blank or different from original)

originalRxcui.description: The Rxnorm concept associated with the NDC when it was active

startDate.description: First Rxnorm release where the NDC was active (YYYYMM)

endDate.description: Last Rxnorm release where the NDC was active (YYYYMM)

ndcHistories.description: History of the NDC within the Rxnorm vocabulary

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_rxcui_history_status
rxnav.description: Return the status, attributes, and history of the Rxnorm concept identified by the rxcui parameter.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

status.description: Concept status (Active, Obsolete, Remapped, Quantified, NotCurrent, Unknown)

source.description: A source vocabulary of the concept

isCurrent.description: Whether the concept has an active Rxnorm vocabulary term (YES/NO)

activeStartDate.description: First Rxnorm release with active term (MMYYYY)

activeEndDate.description: Last Rxnorm release with active term (MMYYYY)

remappedDate.description: Earliest release version in which concept was remapped (MMYYYY)

isMultipleIngredient.description: Whether the concept has multiple ingredients (YES/NO)

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_term_types
rxnav.description: Get concept term types in the Rxnorm data set. Synonym term types such as TMSY, PSN or SY are not included.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

termTypes.description: List of term types in the Rxnorm data set

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_source_types
rxnav.description: Get the vocabulary source abbreviations (SABs) in the Rxnorm data set.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

sourceTypes.description: List of vocabulary source abbreviations (SABs) in the Rxnorm data set

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_rxnorm_version
rxnav.description: Get the version of the Rxnorm data set and the version of the REST APIs.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

version.description: Version of Rxnorm that the API dispenses

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_rxnorm_name
rxnav.description: Return the name of the concept identified by the rxcui parameter.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_spelling_suggestions
rxnav.description: Get spelling suggestions for a given term. The suggestions are terms contained in the current version of the Rxnorm data set, listed in decreasing order of closeness to the original phrase.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

suggestions.description: List of spelling suggestions in decreasing order of closeness

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_display_terms
rxnav.description: Gets the names used by RxNav for auto completion. This is a large list which includes names of ingredients, precise ingredients, brands, and synonyms of branded packs.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

displayTerms.description: List of display terms for auto-completion, including ingredient names, brands, and synonyms

rxnav.name: rxnorm_find_related_ndcs
rxnav.description: Get NDCs that are related by concept, drug, or NDC product. Can filter by NDC status (active, obsolete, alien, unknown).

ndc.description: NDC (CMS 11-digit, or three-segment 5-3-2, 5-4-1, or 4-4-2, or two-segment 4-4, 5-3, or 5-4; no asterisks)

relation.description: Group of NDCs to retrieve: concept (same Rxnorm concept), product (same NDC product), drug (same Rxnorm active drug)

ndcstatus.description: Status filter for NDCs to retrieve: active, obsolete, alien, ALL (space-separated list)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

ndc11.description: National Drug Code (NDC) in CMS 11-digit format

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_all_concepts_by_status
rxnav.description: Return concept information for specified status values. Includes Active, Obsolete, Quantified, Remapped, NotCurrent, and Unknown concepts.

status.description: Status(es) to filter by: Active, Obsolete, Quantified, Remapped, NotCurrent, ALL (space-separated list)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

concepts.description: List of concepts with the specified status

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_all_historical_ndcs
rxnav.description: Get the National Drug Codes (NDCs) for a Rxnorm concept. Includes historical associations with configurable depth: current only, ever directly associated, or ever directly or indirectly associated.

rxcui.description: Rxnorm identifier of a drug product (term type SBD, SCD, BPCK, or GPCK)

history.description: Depth of history to retrieve: 0 (presently associated), 1 (ever directly associated), 2 (ever directly or indirectly associated)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxcui.description: RxCUI of concept to which the NDCs are or were directly associated

ndc.description: National Drug Code (NDC) in CMS 11-digit format

startDate.description: First Rxnorm release where NDC was active (YYYYMM format)

endDate.description: Last Rxnorm release where NDC was active (YYYYMM format)

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_all_ndcs_by_status
rxnav.description: Get the list of National Drug Codes (NDCs) that have appeared in RxNav's data sources, optionally filtered by NDC status (Active, Obsolete, Alien, or ALL).

status.description: NDC status(es) to filter by: Active, Obsolete, Alien, ALL (space-separated list)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

ndcs.description: List of National Drug Codes (NDCs) in CMS 11-digit format

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_proprietary_information
rxnav.description: Get the string, term type, source, and source's identifier for atoms in a specified concept. Returns proprietary information from RXNORM source vocabularies.

srclist.description: Source vocabularies (space-separated list, see getSourceTypes for menu)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

id.description: Source vocabulary's ID for the term

proprietaryInfo.description: List of proprietary information for the concept

rxnav.name: rxnorm_get_reformulation_concepts
rxnav.description: Gets pairs of active Rxnorm concepts related by 'reformulation_of' relationship. Returns original and reformulated concept pairs.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

reformulatedName.description: Name of concept with new formula

reformulationConcepts.description: List of original and reformulated concept pairs

rxnav.name: rxterms_get_rxterms_version
rxnav.description: Get the Rxterms version information. Returns the current Rxterms data set version.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: rxterms_get_rxterm_display_name
rxnav.description: Get the Rxterms display name for a specified Rxnorm concept. Returns the formatted display name from Rxterms for drug products.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

displayName.description: Rxterms display name for the concept (e.g., 'Acetaminophen (Oral Pill)')

rxnav.name: rxterms_get_all_rxterm_info
rxnav.description: Get all Rxterms information for a specified Rxnorm concept. Returns comprehensive properties including brand name, display name, synonym, strength, dose form, route, etc.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

termType.description: Term type (e.g., SCD, SBD, BPCK, GPCK)

rxtermsProperties.description: Comprehensive Rxterms properties for the concept

rxnav.name: rxterms_get_all_concepts
rxnav.description: Get all Rxterms concepts. Returns concept information for all Rxterms concepts including SCD, SBD, BPCK, and GPCK term types.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

termType.description: Term type (e.g., SCD, SBD, BPCK, GPCK)

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_class_types
rxnav.description: Get the class types available in Rxclass. Returns a list of classification types like ATC1-4, CHEM, CVX, DISEASE, etc. that can be used as filters in other Rxclass APIs.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

classTypes.description: List of available class type names (e.g., ATC1-4, CHEM, CVX, DISEASE, EPC, MOA, PE, PK, SCHEDULE, STRUCT, TC, VA)

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_all_classes
rxnav.description: Get all drug classes, or classes of certain types. Can be filtered by class types (e.g., ATC1-4, CHEM, DISEASE). Returns class ID, name, type, and URL for each class.

classTypes.description: Optional space-separated list of class types to filter by (e.g., 'TC SCHEDULE'). Use values from getClassTypes API. Default is ALL.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

classes.description: List of drug classes with their properties

rxnav.name: rxclass_find_class_by_name
rxnav.description: Find drug classes by name. Searches for classes with the specified name (which may be a synonym). Can be filtered by class types.

className.description: Name of the class to search for

classType.description: Optional class type to filter by (e.g., 'ATC1-4', 'CHEM', 'EPC', etc.). Use values from getClassTypes API. Default is ALL.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

classes.description: List of drug classes matching the search criteria

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_class_by_rxnorm_drug_id
rxnav.description: Get the classes that directly contain a given Rxnorm concept (rxcui) or any product or ingredient related to it. Can be filtered by drug-class sources and relations.

relaSource.description: Optional source of drug-class relationships (e.g., MEDRT, VA). Use getSourcesOfDrugClassRelations for the menu. Default is ALL.

relas.description: Optional space-separated list of relationships the drug may have to the class (e.g., 'may_treat'). Use getRelas for the menu. Default is ALL.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rela.description: Member relationship that defines the class

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_relas
rxnav.description: Get the drug-to-class relationships from a given source. Returns relationship types like 'has_chemical_structure', 'has_epc', 'has_moa', 'has_pe', 'may_treat', etc.

relaSource.description: Optional source of drug relations (e.g., 'dailymed', 'MEDRT'). Use getSourcesOfDrugClassRelations for the menu. Default is ALL.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

relationships.description: List of available relationship types (e.g., has_chemical_structure, has_epc, has_moa, has_pe, may_treat)

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_sources_of_drug_class_relations
rxnav.description: Get the list of sources that associate generic drugs to the class types. Returns sources like ATC, DAILYMED, MEDRT, VA, etc.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

relaSources.description: List of available relationship source names (e.g., ATC, DAILYMED, MEDRT, VA, SNOMEDCT)

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_rela_source_version
rxnav.description: Get the version of a data set from which Rxclass draws drug-class relations. Returns version information for sources like ATC, MEDRT, SNOMEDCT, VA, etc.

relaSource.description: Data set name (e.g., 'ATC', 'MEDRT', 'SNOMEDCT', 'VA'). Use getSourcesOfDrugClassRelations for the menu.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

relaSourceVersion.description: Version of the data set that declares the drug-class relations (e.g., '2023_03_21', '2021.09.07')

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_class_by_rxnorm_drug_name
rxnav.description: Get the classes that directly contain a drug of the specified name or any product or ingredient related to it. Can be filtered by drug-class sources and relations.

drugName.description: Name of a generic or branded drug (e.g., 'morphine', 'aspirin')

relaSource.description: Optional source of drug-class relationships (e.g., MEDRT, VA). Use getSourcesOfDrugClassRelations for the menu. Default is ALL.

relas.description: Optional space-separated list of relationships the drug may have to the class (e.g., 'may_treat'). Use getRelas for the menu. Default is ALL.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rela.description: Member relationship that defines the class

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_spelling_suggestions
rxnav.description: Get spelling suggestions for a given drug or class name. Returns suggestions in decreasing order of closeness to the original phrase.

term.description: Possibly misspelled drug or class name

type.description: Scope of search. 'DRUG' for drug-name spellings, 'CLASS' for class-name spellings. Default is DRUG.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

suggestions.description: List of spelling suggestions in decreasing order of closeness

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_class_contexts
rxnav.description: Get the contexts of a class. Returns paths from the specified class to the root of its class hierarchies. Each path shows the hierarchical relationships.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

classPaths.description: List of hierarchical paths from the class to root

rxnav.name: rxclass_find_classes_by_id
rxnav.description: Find drug classes by class identifier. Supports various ID types including ATC, MeSH, SNOMED CT, VA Class, Drug Schedule, etc.

classId.description: Class identifier (e.g., 'B01AA' for ATC, 'D000998' for MeSH, 'N0000000133' for NUI, 'MS140' for VA, '324643005' for SNOMED CT, 'Schedule3' for Drug Schedule)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

classes.description: List of drug classes found by the identifier

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_class_members
rxnav.description: Get the drug members of a specified class. Returns RXCUIs, names, term types, and membership attributes of each member.

classId.description: Class identifier (e.g., 'N0000008638' for NUI, 'B01AA' for ATC)

relaSource.description: Source asserting relationships between drug members and the class (e.g., 'DAILYMED', 'ATC', 'MEDRT')

rela.description: Optional relationship of the drug class to its members (e.g., 'has_PE', 'may_treat')

trans.description: Extent of results. '0' for direct and indirect relations (default), '1' for direct relations only

ttys.description: Optional space-separated list of term types to retrieve (e.g., 'IN PIN'). Default is ALL

data.description: Raw response data from the API

drugMembers.description: List of drug members in the class

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_similarity_information
rxnav.description: Return metrics of similarity between two classes. Compares clinically-significant membership and returns equivalence and inclusion scores.

rela1.description: Class 1: relationship to its members (optional, may be empty for ATC)

rela2.description: Class 2: relationship to its members (optional, e.g., 'has_moa')

data.description: Raw response data from the API

drugClassConcept.description: Information about the two classes being compared

drugClassPair.description: Drug pairs showing membership in both classes

equivalenceScore.description: Degree of overlap of two classes

inclusionScore.description: Degree to which one class includes the other

intersection.description: Number of drugs common to both classes

similarityInformation.description: Detailed similarity information between the two classes

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_class_tree
rxnav.description: Get the class tree rooted at a specified class. Returns the class and all its descendant classes in a hierarchical tree structure.

classId.description: Class identifier (e.g., 'N0000185505' for Cytochrome P450 Inducers)

classType.description: Optional class type to restrict results (e.g., 'MOA', 'CHEM'). Use getClassTypes for the menu.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

classTree.description: Hierarchical tree structure of classes starting from the root class and including all descendants

rxnav.name: rxclass_get_class_graph_by_source
rxnav.description: Get the ancestors of a class as a graph of nodes and edges. Returns the path from the specified class to the root of a class hierarchy.

source.description: Optional class type/source to restrict results (e.g., 'disease', 'chem'). Use getClassTypes for the menu.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxclassMinConceptItem.description: Array of class nodes in the graph

rxclassEdge.description: Array of edges connecting the class nodes

classGraph.description: Graph representation with nodes and edges showing class hierarchy

rxnav.name: rxclass_find_similar_classes_by_class
rxnav.description: Find drug classes with similar clinically-significant Rxnorm ingredients to a specified class. Returns classes ranked by similarity scores.

classId.description: Class identifier (e.g., 'L01E' for ATC protein kinase inhibitors)

rela.description: Relationship to class members (e.g., 'isa_structure', may be empty for ATC)

scoreType.description: Ranking type: '0' for equivalence (default), '1' for includes, '2' for included-in

top.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rankClassConcept.description: Drug classes ranked by similarity with scores

similarityMember.description: Similarity results with ingredients and ranked classes

rxnav.name: rxclass_find_similar_classes_by_drug_list
rxnav.description: Find drug classes with clinically-significant Rxnorm ingredients similar to a specified list of RxCUIs. Returns classes ranked by similarity scores.

rxcuis.description: Space-separated list of Rxnorm drug identifiers (e.g., '7052 7676 7804 23088' for morphine, opium, oxycodone, dihydrocodeine). At most 500 items.

relaSource.description: Optional source of drug relations to search (e.g., 'ATC', 'DAILYMED'). Default is ALL.

rela.description: Optional relationship of the drug class to its members. Default is ALL.

scoreType.description: Ranking type: '0' for equivalence (default), '1' for includes, '2' for included-in

top.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rankClassConcept.description: Drug classes ranked by similarity with scores

similarityMember.description: Similarity results with ingredients and ranked classes

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_term_types
rxnav.description: Get concept term types in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Returns active term types, excluding synonyms like TMSY, PSN or SY.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

termTypes.description: List of term types in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set (e.g., BN, IN, SCD, etc.)

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_source_types
rxnav.description: Get vocabulary source abbreviations (SABs) in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Returns current source vocabularies.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

sourceNames.description: List of vocabulary source abbreviations (e.g., RXNORM, MTHSPL, MTHCMSFRF)

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_id_types
rxnav.description: Get concept identifier types that may be used with findRxcuiById in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Returns available ID types for drug identification.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

idNames.description: List of identifier type names (e.g., NDC, NDA, ANDA, BLA, UNII_CODE, SPL_SET_ID)

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_rxnorm_name
rxnav.description: Return the name of a prescribable concept identified by RxCUI. Provides the official Rxnorm concept name.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_prop_categories
rxnav.description: Return the property categories in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Provides RxNav property category classifications.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

propCategories.description: List of RxNav property categories (e.g., ATTRIBUTES, CODES, NAMES, SOURCES)

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_prop_names
rxnav.description: Return the property names in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Provides available property names for drug information retrieval.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

propNames.description: List of property names (e.g., ACTIVATED, ANADA, ANDA, AVAILABLE_STRENGTH, etc.)

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_rela_types
rxnav.description: Get the relationship names in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Returns Rxnorm relationship types for concept connections.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

relationTypes.description: List of Rxnorm relationship types (e.g., boss_of, consists_of, has_ingredient, etc.)

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_spelling_suggestions
rxnav.description: Get spelling suggestions for a given term in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Returns terms similar to the specified string in decreasing order of closeness.

name.description: Possibly misspelled term to get spelling suggestions for (e.g., 'ambienn' to get 'ambien')

data.description: Raw response data from the API

suggestions.description: List of spelling suggestions in decreasing order of closeness to the original term

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_display_terms
rxnav.description: Get display terms used by RxNav for auto-completion in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Returns names of ingredients, precise ingredients, brands, and synonyms.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

displayTerms.description: List of display terms for auto-completion (ingredients, brands, synonyms)

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_ndcs
rxnav.description: Get the active National Drug Codes (NDCs) for a prescribable Rxnorm concept. Returns NDCs in CMS 11-digit format for drug products.

rxcui.description: Rxnorm identifier of a drug product (term type SBD, SCD, BPCK, or GPCK)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

ndcs.description: List of National Drug Codes (NDCs) in CMS 11-digit format

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_drugs
rxnav.description: Get drug products associated with a specified name in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Supports ingredients, brands, clinical dose forms, branded dose forms, and drug components.

name.description: Name of ingredient, brand, clinical dose form, branded dose form, clinical drug component, or branded drug component

expand.description: Additional result fields to retrieve. 'psn' for Prescribable Name

data.description: Raw response data from the API

tty.description: Term type of concepts in this group

conceptGroups.description: Drug concepts grouped by term type (TTY)

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_approximate_match
rxnav.description: Search for strings in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set that most closely match a query term. Useful for approximate string matching with misspellings, abbreviations, or extra words.

term.description: String of which to find approximate matches

maxEntries.description: Coarse control of number of results (default: 20)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

candidates.description: List of candidate matches ordered by quality of lexical match

rxnav.name: prescribable_find_rxcui_by_string
rxnav.description: Search for prescribable drug concepts by name with various precision levels (exact, normalized, approximate). Returns RxCUI identifiers for matching concepts.

srclist.description: Space-separated list of source vocabularies to filter by (if allsrc=1)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxcuis.description: List of Rxnorm concept identifiers (RxCUIs) matching the search

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_rx_property
rxnav.description: Get the value(s) of a specific property of a prescribable Rxnorm concept. Returns property values with their categories.

propName.description: Property name to retrieve (e.g., 'RxNorm Name', 'TTY', 'ATC', 'UNII_CODE', etc.)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

propCategory.description: RxNav category that includes the property

properties.description: List of property values for the specified property name

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_rx_concept_properties
rxnav.description: Get the properties of a prescribable Rxnorm concept, including name, TTY, synonym, language, and suppress status.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

properties.description: Properties of the Rxnorm concept (null if concept not found)

rxnav.name: prescribable_find_rxcui_by_id
rxnav.description: Search for RxCUI identifiers by various ID types (NDC, UNII_CODE, NDA, etc.) in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Returns RxCUIs associated with the specified identifier.

idtype.description: Type of identifier (e.g., NDC, UNII_CODE, NDA, etc.)

id.description: The identifier value to search for

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxcuis.description: List of RxCUI identifiers associated with the specified ID

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_multi_ingred_brand
rxnav.description: Get brand names that contain all specified ingredients in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Useful for finding combination drug brands.

ingredientids.description: Space-separated list of ingredient RXCUIs to find brands containing all of them

data.description: Raw response data from the API

brands.description: List of brand concepts containing all specified ingredients

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_all_properties
rxnav.description: Get all or specific categories of properties for a prescribable Rxnorm concept. Returns detailed property information including names, codes, attributes, and sources.

prop.description: Property categories to retrieve (space-separated) or 'ALL' for all categories. Categories include: CODES, ATTRIBUTES, NAMES, SOURCES

data.description: Raw response data from the API

propCategory.description: RxNav category that includes the property

properties.description: List of all properties with their categories, names, and values

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_related_by_type
rxnav.description: Get prescribable Rxnorm concepts of specified term types that are directly or indirectly related to a given concept. Useful for finding related drugs by type.

tty.description: Space-separated list of term types to retrieve (e.g., SBD SBDF, IN BN)

expand.description: Additional result fields to retrieve (e.g., 'psn' for Prescribable Name)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

tty.description: Term type of concepts in this group

concepts.description: List of related concepts for this term type

related_concepts.description: Related concepts grouped by term type

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_rela_paths
rxnav.description: Get relationship paths between term types in the Prescribable Rxnorm data set. Returns the definition of RxNav's related-concepts graph.

start.description: Starting term type (TTY) to filter paths

finish.description: Ending term type (TTY) to filter paths

data.description: Raw response data from the API

path.description: The TTY path from start to finish (e.g., ['BN', 'IN'])

paths.description: List of relationship paths between term types

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_related_by_relationship
rxnav.description: Get prescribable Rxnorm concepts directly related to a specified concept by specified relationships. Useful for finding related drugs by relationship type.

expand.description: Additional result fields to retrieve (e.g., 'psn' for Prescribable Name)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

tty.description: Term type of concepts in this group

concepts.description: List of related concepts for this term type

related_concepts.description: Related concepts grouped by term type

rxnav.name: prescribable_get_all_related_info
rxnav.description: Get all related information for a prescribable Rxnorm concept including properties, related concepts, and NDCs. Comprehensive concept information.

data.description: Raw response data from the API

related_info.description: Comprehensive related information including properties, concepts, and NDCs

rxnav.name: prescribable_filter_by_property
rxnav.description: Filter prescribable Rxnorm concepts by property values. Returns concepts that match specified property criteria.

propValues.description: Space-separated list of property values to match (optional)

data.description: Raw response data from the API

rxcui.description: The RxCUI that was checked (returned if it meets criteria)

hasProperty.description: Whether the concept has the specified property
